component.name: Aurora Forecast
component.summary: Monitor the Aurora Borealis Kp index from your panel

description.p: Aurora Forecast is a native COSMIC applet that helps you track the probability of seeing the Northern Lights. It displays the current estimated planetary K-index (Kp) directly in your panel.

ul.li: Real-time Kp index updates from NOAA data sources
Color-coded indicators (Green, Orange, Red) for activity levels
Interactive popup with forecast details and raw data access
One-click access to the latest aurora ovation images
Desktop notifications when activity levels change

screenshot.caption: The applet displaying a low activity forecast
